items.title: Hollander POTD Dan Roundfield. Dr Rounds was signed by IND of the ABA in 75. After 3 solid yrs, signed by ATL in 79. Put up 18.5 ppg 11.3 rpg in 6 yrs & made 3 all-star gms. Finished up w/DET & WAS from 84-87. Very good pro. Sadly died in 2012 saving his wife from drowning. RIP.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollander POTD Dan Roundfield. Dr Rounds was signed by IND of the ABA in 75. After 3 solid yrs, signed by ATL in 79. Put up 18.5 ppg 11.3 rpg in 6 yrs & made 3 all-star gms. Finished up w/DET & WAS from 84-87. Very good pro. Sadly died in 2012 saving his wife from drowning. RIP.

items.title: The 3-point brick vs the Knicks this postseason has been something else
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
The 3-point brick vs the Knicks this postseason has been something else

Hawks: 31.2% (ranked 5th in regular season, 37.1%)

76ers: 31.3% (34.9% 3s, ranked 23rd)

Cavaliers: 28.9% (36% 3s, ranked 13th)

Spurs: 35.9% 3s (ranked 15th)
Thunder: 36.5% 3s (ranked 9th)

items.title: The New York Knicks have been a National Basketball Association team from the beginning of the damn league
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
The New York Knicks have been a National Basketball Association team from the beginning of the damn league

Their three largest playoff series margins of victory have been this year

+105 vs Hawks
+89 vs 76ers
+77 vs Cavaliers

previous high was +54 in 1972 East semis vs Bullets.

items.title: Knicks are the first team in NBA history to have three 20+ point series clinching wins in a single playoff run.
items.author: Keerthika Uthayakumar
items.body_excerpt:
Knicks are the first team in NBA history to have three 20+ point series clinching wins in a single playoff run. 

51-point win in Game 6 vs the Hawks
30-point win in Game 4 vs the 76ers
37-point win in Game 4 vs the Cavs

items.title: The Hawks distributed these NBA Jam T-shirts near the end of the season for awards consideration.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
The Hawks distributed these NBA Jam T-shirts near the end of the season for awards consideration.

Ended up hitting the trifecta.

— MIP for Nickeil Alexander-Walker

— All-NBA for Jalen Johnson

— All-Defense for Dyson Daniels

items.title: Hawks forward Jalen Johnson was selected to the 2025-26 All-NBA third team.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
Hawks forward Jalen Johnson was selected to the 2025-26 All-NBA third team.

Johnson averaged 22.5 points, 10.3 rebounds (7th in NBA), and 7.9 assists (5th in NBA) per game.

Johnson joins Nikola Jokic as 1 of only 2 players to finish in the top 8 in both rebounds and assists.

items.title: May 24, 1999: Latrell Sprewell with the steal and slam during New York's 79-66 series-clinching win over Atlanta in Game 4 of the Eastern Conference Semifinals.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
May 24, 1999: Latrell Sprewell with the steal and slam during New York's 79-66 series-clinching win over Atlanta in Game 4 of the Eastern Conference Semifinals.

With the 4-game sweep of the Hawks, the Knicks advanced to play the Indiana Pacers in the Eastern Conference Finals.

items.title: All-NBA teams will be announced tonight.

All-NBA teams will be announced tonight.

items.title: Sources: The Milwaukee Bucks will add Patrick St. Andrews as an assistant coach, reuniting him with coach Taylor Jenkins. He was an assistant coach for the Blazers. Prior, he was an assistant coach with Jenkins on the Grizzlies and with Mike Budenholzer on the Bucks and Hawks.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: Sources: The Milwaukee Bucks will add Patrick St. Andrews as an assistant coach, reuniting him with coach Taylor Jenkins. He was an assistant coach for the Blazers. Prior, he was an assistant coach with Jenkins on the Grizzlies and with Mike Budenholzer on the Bucks and Hawks.

items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
All of the top-5 defenses had at least one All-Defense selection

1. OKC (Holmgren, Wallace)
2. DET (Thompson)
3. SA (Wembanyama)
4. BOS (White)
5. TOR (Barnes)

Other 4 selections/what team's defense ranked:

7. NY (Anunoby)
8. MIN (Gobert)
10. ATL (Daniels)
14. MIA (Adebayo)

items.title: Hawks' Dyson Daniels made second team All-Defense. NAW somewhat surprisingly did not get a single vote.
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt:
Hawks' Dyson Daniels made second team All-Defense. NAW somewhat surprisingly did not get a single vote.

I'm a bit surprised Portland's Toumani Camara didn't get more love, after Blazers made playoffs and he drew an unfathomable number of offensive fouls, but overall a defensible vote.

Scottie Barnes (Raptors)
Cason Wallace (Thunder)
Dyson Daniels (Hawks)

items.title: Hawks guard Dyson Daniels has been named to the All-Defensive second team.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
Hawks guard Dyson Daniels has been named to the All-Defensive second team.

Daniels tied for the league lead in steals per game (2.0) and helped to drive Atlanta to a top-10 overall defense for the first time since the 2016-17 season.

items.title: May 22, 1988: Fourth quarter highlights from the Larry Bird-Dominique Wilkins ECSF Game 7 "duel."
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
May 22, 1988: Fourth quarter highlights from the Larry Bird-Dominique Wilkins ECSF Game 7 "duel."

Bird scored 20 of his 34 PTS in the fourth quarter on 9-10 FG; Wilkins scored 16 of his 47 PTS in the fourth quarter on 6-9 FG.  The Boston Celtics beat the Atlanta Hawks, 118-116.
